body_txt: Big breasts are frequently considered attractive , so girls with shy personalities and/or a history of being harassed for their "assets" by either lecherous men or envious women (i.e. D-Cup Distress ) may tend to hide them from view, either by wearing baggy clothes or by outright suppressing with bandages , tight bras, etc. Not to be confused with Suppressed Mammaries , where a woman (generally an actress) keeps her assets "at bay" temporarily and with a specific goal/task/purpose in mind. Compare Clark Kent Outfit and contrast Fake Boobs . Note : Not every girl who looks like a boy who looks like a girl qualifies; possessing unambiguously large breasts is a requirement .
